CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-09-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Nov-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert M. Sellards, Esq. appeared with petitioner Yong Zhuang Zhen, who present as Guardian ad litem for the minor Edison Zhen, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and examined.
Manna Zheng was placed under oath and served as Mandarin speaking interpreter for petitioner.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $125,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $32,750.00.
Medical Expenses $27,000.00.

The net balance of $65,250.00 shall be placed into an annuity in the name of Edison Zhen as described in Attachment 7b2b.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Continued To Dec-11-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
